title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, an AI pioneer and Nobel Prize winner, argues that current AI systems already understand and may be conscious, that superintelligence could arrive sooner than expected, and that society is not adequately addressing the risks. He discusses job displacement, limitations of corporate self-regulation, and the need for external regulation.
